about_page.title: About RCB
about_page.subtitle: Connecting travelers with premium car rentals across Georgia
about_page.mission_p1: At Rent Cars Georgia (RCB), we believe that exploring Georgia should be easy, affordable, and unforgettable. We connect international travelers with verified local partners to provide premium car rental experiences.
about_page.mission_p2: Our platform eliminates middlemen, ensuring you get the best prices while supporting local businesses. Whether you're climbing mountains, touring cities, or relaxing on the coast, we have the perfect vehicle for your adventure.
about_page.reliability_desc: Every vehicle is thoroughly inspected and maintained to ensure your safety and comfort.
about_page.transparency_desc: No hidden fees, no surprises. Clear pricing and straightforward terms from booking to return.
about_page.community_desc: We support local partners and help grow Georgia's tourism ecosystem sustainably.
about_page.innovation_desc: Cutting-edge booking technology makes renting a car as simple as booking a flight.
about_page.team_david_bio: Passionate about Georgia and committed to revolutionizing car rentals for travelers.
about_page.team_tamar_bio: Ensures every rental experience exceeds expectations with attention to detail.
about_page.team_giorgi_bio: Building the platform that makes car rental simple and transparent.
about_page.team_nino_bio: Available 24/7 to ensure your rental experience is smooth and memorable.
about_page.why_prices_desc: Direct connection with owners means no middleman markup
about_page.why_verified_desc: All vehicles and owners are thoroughly vetted and reviewed
about_page.why_selection_desc: From budget-friendly economy cars to luxury vehicles
about_page.why_support_desc: Our team is always available via phone, email, or WhatsApp
about_page.cta_subtitle: Browse our fleet and find the perfect ride for your journey.

privacy_page.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_page.s1_p1: This Privacy Policy explains how RoyalCar.rent collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you use our website and services. We want you to feel safe and confident when renting a vehicle with us.
privacy_page.s1_highlight: In short: We only collect what we need to process your rental, and we never sell your data to anyone.
privacy_page.s2_intro: When you use our website, we may collect the following information:
privacy_page.s2_item1: Account details — your name, email address, and phone number when you register
privacy_page.s2_item2: Booking details — pickup/drop-off dates, locations, and vehicle preferences
privacy_page.s2_item3: Payment information — processed securely through PayPal; we never see or store your card numbers
privacy_page.s2_item4: Documents — driver's license and passport photos shared with vehicle owners via WhatsApp for verification
privacy_page.s2_item5: Communication — messages you send us through our contact form or email
privacy_page.s3_intro: We use your information only to:
privacy_page.s3_item1: Process your bookings — create reservations and connect you with vehicle owners
privacy_page.s3_item2: Communicate with you — send booking confirmations, updates, and respond to your questions
privacy_page.s3_item3: Improve our service — understand how our website is used so we can make it better
privacy_page.s3_item4: Ensure safety — verify driver eligibility and prevent fraud
privacy_page.s3_highlight: We will never use your information for unsolicited marketing or share it with advertisers.
privacy_page.s4_intro: Your financial safety is our top priority.
privacy_page.s4_item1: All online payments are handled entirely by PayPal
privacy_page.s4_item2: We never see, store, or have access to your credit card or debit card numbers
privacy_page.s4_item3: Your card details are entered directly on PayPal's secure platform
privacy_page.s4_item4: PayPal uses industry-leading encryption and fraud protection
privacy_page.s4_highlight: Your card information never touches our servers. It goes directly to PayPal, which is one of the most trusted payment platforms in the world.
privacy_page.s5_intro: We share your information only with:
privacy_page.s5_item1: Vehicle owners/partners — only the details needed to fulfill your booking (name, dates, contact info, documents)
privacy_page.s5_item2: PayPal — only for processing your payment securely
privacy_page.s5_item3: Law enforcement — only if legally required by Georgian law
privacy_page.s5_outro: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to any third parties.
privacy_page.s6_intro: We take reasonable steps to keep your information safe:
privacy_page.s6_item1: Passwords are encrypted and never stored in plain text
privacy_page.s6_item2: Secure connections (HTTPS) protect data in transit
privacy_page.s6_item3: Access to personal data is limited to authorized personnel only
privacy_page.s6_item4: We regularly review our security practices
privacy_page.s7_item1: Access — request a copy of the personal data we hold about you
privacy_page.s7_item2: Correct — ask us to update or fix incorrect information
privacy_page.s7_item3: Delete — request that we remove your account and personal data
privacy_page.s7_item4: Withdraw consent — stop us from using your data at any time
privacy_page.s7_outro: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at elite.rental25@gmail.com.
privacy_page.s8_intro: Our website may use cookies (small files stored on your device) to:
privacy_page.s8_item1: Keep you logged in during your session
privacy_page.s8_outro: We do not use tracking cookies or share cookie data with advertisers.
privacy_page.s9_p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. If we make significant changes, we will notify you through our website. We encourage you to review this page periodically.
privacy_page.s10_intro: If you have any questions or concerns about your privacy, feel free to reach out:

tos_page.title: Terms & Conditions
tos_page.s1_p1: RoyalCar.rent provides vehicle rental services within Georgia. All vehicles listed on the website are maintained and operated by RoyalCar or its verified partners.
tos_page.s1_highlight: By making a reservation through the website or directly with RoyalCar, the Client agrees to comply with the terms outlined in this agreement.
tos_page.s2_intro: To rent a vehicle, the Client must meet the following requirements:
tos_page.s2_premium: Some premium or luxury vehicles may require a higher minimum age.
tos_page.s2_docs_intro: At the time of vehicle pick-up, the Client must present:
tos_page.s2_doc3: International Driver's Permit (IDP), if required by Georgian law
tos_page.s3_p1: Vehicles can be reserved online or through direct communication with RoyalCar.
tos_page.s3_p2: Reservations may require a partial prepayment to confirm the booking. The remaining balance is paid at the time of vehicle pick-up unless otherwise agreed.
tos_page.s4_intro: A security deposit may be required depending on the vehicle category. The deposit is used to cover:
tos_page.s4_highlight: If no issues occur during the rental period, the deposit will be fully refunded after vehicle return.
tos_page.s5_p1: The rented vehicle may only be driven by the person listed in the rental agreement unless an additional driver is approved.
tos_page.s5_item2: Follow all traffic laws in Georgia
tos_page.s5_item3: Not operate the vehicle under the influence of alcohol or drugs
tos_page.s5_item4: Not use the vehicle for illegal activities
tos_page.s5_item5: Not participate in racing or off-road driving unless permitted
tos_page.s5_warning: Driving outside Georgia may require prior approval from RoyalCar.
tos_page.s6_intro: Most vehicles include basic insurance coverage. Possible insurance options may include:
tos_page.s6_item1: Third-Party Liability (TPL) — Covers damages caused to third parties.
tos_page.s6_item2: Collision Damage Waiver (CDW) — Reduces the driver's financial responsibility for damage to the vehicle.
tos_page.s6_item3: Full Insurance — Provides broader protection but may still include exclusions or deductibles.
tos_page.s6_warning: Clients must immediately report any accident or damage to RoyalCar and follow the instructions provided.
tos_page.s7_p1: Vehicles are typically delivered with a specific fuel level. The Client must return the vehicle with the same fuel level as at pick-up.
tos_page.s8_item1: Reservations may be cancelled free of charge up to 24 hours before pick-up.
tos_page.s8_item2: If cancellation occurs less than 24 hours before pick-up, the prepayment may be non-refundable.
tos_page.s8_unavail: In case of vehicle unavailability, RoyalCar will offer:
tos_page.s8_option1: A replacement vehicle of equal or higher category, or
tos_page.s8_option2: A full refund of the prepayment
tos_page.s9_item3: In the same condition as received (except normal wear)
tos_page.s9_warning: Late returns may result in additional rental charges.
tos_page.s10_intro: The Client is fully responsible for:
tos_page.s10_item4: Any penalties incurred during the rental period
tos_page.s10_outro: RoyalCar reserves the right to charge the Client for any fines received after the rental period.
tos_page.s11_p1: Vehicles must be returned in reasonable condition. Excessively dirty vehicles, including damage caused by pets or smoking, may incur additional cleaning fees.
tos_page.s11_warning: Smoking inside vehicles is strictly prohibited.
tos_page.s12_item1: Loss of personal belongings inside the vehicle
tos_page.s12_item2: Delays caused by accidents, weather, or road conditions
tos_page.s12_item3: Costs related to missed flights or appointments
tos_page.s13_p1: These terms are governed by the laws of Georgia. Any disputes arising from rental agreements shall be handled under the jurisdiction of the Tbilisi City Court.
tos_page.s14_intro: By renting a vehicle from RoyalCar, the Client confirms that they:
tos_page.s14_item1: Have read and understood these Terms & Conditions
tos_page.s14_item2: Agree to comply with all rental policies
tos_page.s14_item3: Accept full responsibility for the vehicle during the rental period

reservation.no_services: No additional services available for this vehicle.
reservation.deposit_note: A refundable cash deposit is required at pickup
reservation.driver_req_text: Driver must be at least 21 years old with a minimum of 2 years of driving experience.
